_comment: JFK 2024-08-01 severe afternoon GDP. Sudden severe onset at 14:xx (departure threshold ~890 min). Sustained 15:xx-22:xx at 67-74 min taxi-out. Late phase extended and at higher intensity to match 19-21:xx actuals (~69-72 min).
_calibration: Phases in simulation threshold time. Aug-01 is more severe than Jul-16 and shows less gradual buildup — likely a ground stop that converted to a GDP.

programs.description: Ground stop onset — sudden severe restriction, weather-related runway shutdown
Peak GDP — sustained severe restrictions, largest backlog
Late GDP — weather improving but backlog remains severe through late evening
